query:
fix as scoped:  Root Cause: "duties" and "reference" are stale holdovers in INITIAL_CATEGORIES. Duties  
  was replaced by file-based agent definitions; reference was never used. Additionally,   
  INITIAL_CATEGORIES is duplicated across categories.rs and config.rs, requiring manual   
  sync on every category change.                                                          
                                                                                          
  Fix Scope (as you specified):                                                           
  1. INITIAL_CATEGORIES: [&str; 7] → [&str; 5] in categories.rs, remove duties/reference  
  entries                                                                                 
  2. Make categories.rs::INITIAL_CATEGORIES pub(crate)                                    
  3. Remove duplicate INITIAL_CATEGORIES from config.rs; import from                      
  crate::infra::categories instead                                  
  4. All downstream test + harness updates (8 test edits in categories.rs, 1-2 in         
  config.rs, builtin_claude_code_pack() in domain/mod.rs, domain_pack_tests.rs, Python
  harness)                                                                                
                                                                  
  Design Review: APPROVED WITH NOTES — 4 non-blocking implementation notes:               
  - A: Must add use crate::infra::categories::INITIAL_CATEGORIES; to config.rs (currently
  no import from categories in that file)                                                 
  - B: [&str; 5] size literal update needed in categories.rs; config deletion handles
  itself — compiler enforces both                                                         
  - C: config.rs:2849 — test_default_config_toml_empty_parses_defaults references the     
  local constant by name; needs updating to the imported one                         
  - D: Grep categories.rs test module for all hardcoded 7 — at least 4 assertions, not    
  just 2

entries.title: Category retirement in INITIAL_CATEGORIES requires updates in 4 independent locations
KnowledgeConfig parallel list defaults collide in validate_config test fixtures — zero ALL parallel lists together
ADR-001 crt-031: CategoryAllowlist lifecycle policy constructor, config model, and StatusService wiring
ADR-004 nan-008: Emit tracing::warn! When configured_categories Is Empty in compute_cc_at_k
Clean first-pass delivery from precise scope decomposition and file-aligned parallelism
